description_long: This is a modern commercial jet airliner with a streamlined fuselage painted primarily white, featuring blue accents and the 'ANA' logo on the tail fin. The aircraft has two large turbofan engines mounted under its swept, low-set wings, which are equipped with upward-angled winglets for aerodynamic efficiency. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with multiple windows providing visibility for the flight crew. The landing gear appears to be a tricycle configuration, with the main gear under the wings and a nose gear beneath the cockpit. The aircraft is marked with '787' on the forward fuselage, indicating it is modeled after the Boeing 787 Dreamliner.
description: A sleek, white and blue commercial jet airliner with swept low wings, underwing engines, and a conventional tail, marked with 'ANA' and '787'. The design features a forward cockpit and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: The airplane is seen from the rear, highlighting the tail fin, horizontal stabilizers, and the full wingspan with visible winglets.
description_view_1: A left-side profile view shows the 'ANA' logo on the tail, '787' marking on the fuselage, and both engines under the wings.
description_view_2: The airplane is viewed head-on, emphasizing the nose, cockpit windows, and the two large underwing engines.
description_view_3: A right-side profile view displays the tail design, 'ANA' branding, and the overall length of the fuselage with both engines visible.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept wings and upward-angled winglets.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with multiple windows.
